description: Run an unsteady Lifting Line Theory (LLT) wake simulation using the 'NREL_5MW_Reference.wpa' project from '~/Documents/sample_projects/'. Configure the simulation with a wind speed of approximately 10m/s, a rotational speed of approximately 10RPM, and at least 50 timesteps. Export the velocity cut plane data (e.g., XZ plane at Y=0) intersecting the wake to '~/Documents/projects/wake_cutplane.vtu' and save the project as '~/Documents/projects/llt_simulation.wpa'.
